step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Steven Kilburn, a young man, sought help from Budd Hopkins and his associates to understand a deep-seated fear and sense of unease associated with a particular stretch of Maryland highway from his college years. Through multiple hypnotic regression sessions, Steven recalled being pulled over by an unseen force, encountering several small, white-skinned, hairless humanoids (Greys) who wore black clothing, and being subjected to a physical examination aboard a saucer-shaped craft. The examination involved a clamp, a probing device on his back and stomach, and a sensation of paralysis, with the entities appearing to test his reflexes and examine a mark on his back. The investigation highlights the commonalities with other abduction cases, particularly the "missing time" phenomenon and the physical descriptions of the entities.

encounter_events.source_citation: I can't remember anything specific, but something has always bothered me about a certain stretch of road I used to pass through whenever I left my girlfriend's house in Maryland.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven has fragmentary, persistent memories or feelings about an experience — a lingering sense that something happened on a specific stretch of road, without being able to recall specifics. This matches A116.1: fragmentary memories of an experience persist.

encounter_events.source_citation: something has always bothered me about a certain stretch of road I used to pass through whenever I left my girlfriend's house in Maryland
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven feels alarmed or disturbed when thinking about a particular place — a certain stretch of road. This matches A112: witness feels alarmed on passing a certain place or encountering a certain environment.

encounter_events.source_citation: I can't remember anything specific, but I just feel something happened to me one time when I was driving home.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven's inability to remember what happened during a specific drive home implies a time lapse — a period of missing time during which something occurred that he cannot account for. This matches E200: time lapse.

encounter_events.source_citation: Steve had described the uneasiness he felt whenever he was on that particular length of highway / a deep-seated fear of a certain stretch of highway
encounter_events.ai_justification: A112 covers a witness feeling alarmed on passing a certain place. Steven Kilburn experienced persistent, deep-seated uneasiness and fear specifically associated with a particular stretch of highway. This is a conscious, ongoing emotional state rather than a hypnotically recovered memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: a man who, practically speaking, remembered nothing whatsoever of the experience / there had been a period of unaccountably missing time
encounter_events.ai_justification: E200 covers time lapse. The investigator describes that Steven remembered nothing of the experience and references a period of unaccountably missing time as the general model for such cases, applied here to Steven's situation. This is a consciously recognized gap in memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm not scared now. / We're all just having a good old time standing there. / The intense fear Steven had experienced earlier seemed now to have melted away. He appeared tranquil, as if he were enjoying these outrageous circumstances in a thoroughly detached manner.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness's fear dissolves into calm detachment and tranquility during the encounter, consistent with pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: We're all just having a good old time standing there. I don't know what we're waiting for.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes the bizarre situation as 'having a good old time,' an inappropriately casual response to being surrounded by alien beings, indicating uncharacteristic behavior.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm not really afraid, though.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness reports a lack of fear despite an extraordinary situation. The investigator explicitly notes he concluded Steven had been 'artificially calmed somehow,' consistent with pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: The boss there . . . his eyes are really shiny.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven identifies one being as 'the boss,' indicating a leader among the group of beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: They look black. I don't see any pupils or anything . . . and they're big. / It's almost like they're black and endless. Like they're liquid or something.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's eyes are described as entirely black with no visible pupils, matching 'eyes entirely dark.'

encounter_events.source_citation: and they're big.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are described as large in size.

encounter_events.source_citation: They're really kind of walnut-shaped. Not perfect circles, but almost.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Walnut-shaped eyes correspond to the oval/catlike wraparound eye shape category.

encounter_events.source_citation: his eyes are really shiny. / there's something really shiny coming off this character's eyes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are described as shiny and reflective, consistent with luminous eyes.

encounter_events.source_citation: His head is not round, it's like, uh, an inverted teardrop. With a big round bar on top.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An inverted teardrop head with a large cranium on top and pointed chin matches the egg/pear-shaped head with pointed chin and large cranium.

encounter_events.source_citation: He looks like he's not alive . . . maybe just because I can't really understand what he is doing or what he is thinking or anything . . . it's like everything's very stilted. / I don't think he really cares about me. I don't think he's really concerned about what I'm thinking.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being appears cold, indifferent, and insensitive to the witness, behaving in a stilted manner and showing no concern for Steven's thoughts.

encounter_events.source_citation: He's not very comfortable there . . . he doesn't want to stick around. He's not telling me, but it's obvious. He wants to leave, I think, more than I do.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The leader being is impatient and wants to leave quickly, consistent with beings being impatient or having little time.

encounter_events.source_citation: I've been aware that I can't do what I want to. They've really got something on me . . . and I don't know what it is. They can just make me do whatever they want.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness explicitly states the beings can compel him against his will, matching beings forcing or compelling witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: They're . . . understanding each other, but they're not talking. I don't hear anything. / 'Cause they're somehow understanding each other.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings communicate with each other without speaking, confirmed as telepathy between beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: There's some conflict, I think. I don't think they're getting along so great. I think there's an argument about something 'cause this boss wants one thing and one of the other guys wants something else. I think they're arguing about a place . . . about where to dig.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings confer and have a dispute among themselves about where to dig, showing they are democratic enough to tolerate disputes.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they're arguing about a place . . . about where to dig. And the boss, there, is pointing—this is it. And the other guy is pointing over toward the fence there, over to the right where it's dark.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are debating where to dig, implying they are gathering samples from the environment.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's very bright. The light is coming from something in back of me. Brighter than daylight. It's really harsh light, but it's not in my eyes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The light behaves oddly — brighter than daylight yet not in the witness's eyes, selectively illuminating the scene from behind him.

encounter_events.source_citation: when he walked, it was almost like he had two really bad knees. He was hobbling almost . . . shifting his weight to
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being moves in a clumsy, stiff, hobbling fashion, consistent with beings moving in a crippled manner.

encounter_events.source_citation: I've been aware that I can't do what I want to.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is unable to act on his own volition, implying a form of paralysis or immobilization of will, distinct from the beings' agency coded as B903.

encounter_events.source_citation: His head is not round, it's like, uh, an inverted teardrop. With a big round bar on top. He looks like he's not alive
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described with humanoid features (head, eyes, walking on legs) but distinctly non-human in appearance, fitting the humanoid classification.

encounter_events.source_citation: Almost rocking back and forth. And he drags his feet a little bit.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being moves in a clumsy, stiff fashion — rocking and dragging its feet — matching B504 (beings move in a clumsy, stiff or crippled fashion).

encounter_events.source_citation: They're almost white. They're not like his head, his face.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's skin/surface is described as almost white, matching B290 (skin white, gray, ashen or claylike).

encounter_events.source_citation: They're shaped like cat's eyes, very almond-shaped.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The feet are described as cat's eye shaped and almond-shaped. While this describes feet, the 'cat's eyes' descriptor applied to the being's overall morphology also evokes B242 (shape wraparound, catlike, oval). However, this actually describes feet shape. Reassigning: this is an anomalous foot description. But the almond shape is a distinctive morphological feature. The feet are club-like with pointed front and back — this is better coded as an anomaly for foot shape. Recoding below.

encounter_events.source_citation: They're shaped like cat's eyes, very almond-shaped. I don't see any toes or anything, but the almond shapes are pointed in the front and the back so that, ah, they're kind of club feet.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's feet are described as almond/cat-eye shaped, toeless, and club-like. No motif code in the dictionary specifically covers anomalous foot morphology of this type. B288 (duck feet) is the closest but does not match.

encounter_events.source_citation: Skinny ankles, legs. Really skinny. Not bony, nothing like that, but he's so little.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as very skinny with thin legs, matching B225 (spindly build, slight musculature).

encounter_events.source_citation: but he's so little.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as very small/little, matching B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less).

encounter_events.source_citation: he kind of looks back. Just to sort of check on where I am. Make sure I don't go anywhere.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being monitors the witness to ensure he doesn't leave, functioning as a guard, matching B620 (stand guard, direct traffic).

encounter_events.source_citation: Arms, too, really skinny, like he has no biceps. He's got almost no shape. He's kind of straight down, kind of almost flat.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's arms are described as very thin with no musculature, matching B271 (thin).

encounter_events.source_citation: his shoulders . . . they're really square, but they're really small. Skinny.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's shoulders are described as very small and skinny, matching B261 (narrow chest, shoulders).

encounter_events.source_citation: His chin is really pointy, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A pointy chin is characteristic of B233 (head egg or pear shaped, with pointed chin, large cranium).

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't see any ears, although there's something there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Ears are absent or barely present, matching B254 (ears close against head, absent, or holes only).

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a slit where his mouth should be, but it's not open . . . just kind of across.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The mouth is described as a slit, matching B258 (mouth slitlike, lips thin).

encounter_events.source_citation: He absolutely does not change expression.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is completely expressionless, matching B910 (beings are impassive).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm really afraid to look at him. I don't want him to think I'm being aggressive.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness expresses fear of the being, matching E505 (fear).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm doing O.K., just watching him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness reassures himself that he can handle the situation, matching E214 (witness reassures self or obeys beings as if they know best).

encounter_events.source_citation: he looks over my head, 'cause it's something moving down. / the boss there
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness refers to one being as 'the boss,' indicating a leader figure, matching B800 (one being acts as leader, spokesman).

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a light moving or something moving that's really bright . . . and the shadows change.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A bright light moves overhead in an unusual manner, changing shadows, matching E125 (light behaves in odd way).

encounter_events.source_citation: That guy is still digging. God, what is he digging for? He's digging with something he's got in his hands. / He's digging a hole.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A being is digging in the ground, gathering or collecting samples from the earth, matching B650 (gather samples).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's not easy for him. / They're kind of fumbling at things. I think he's having trouble digging.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are fumbling and having difficulty with a physical task, indicating fallibility, matching B758 (indications of fallibility).

encounter_events.source_citation: They all look kind of alike. I mean, they're all small and whitish and not real coordinated.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Multiple beings are described as humanoid in form — small, whitish, and similar in appearance, matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: I see two lights in the sky when I'm driving. I'm hunched over, looking up.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven sees two lights in the sky while driving, indicating the UFO nearing and circling overhead.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's a reflection in the windshield and then I turn the light on to see if it's still there. And it is. . . .
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven's instinct was to try to convince himself the lights were only a reflection — an inappropriate or uncharacteristic response of denial to what he was actually witnessing.

encounter_events.source_citation: his description of the involuntary swerve at high speed, as if 'a huge magnet just sucked it over to the right.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The car swerved involuntarily at high speed as if pulled by a magnetic force, indicating the UFO or beings took control of the vehicle.

encounter_events.source_citation: he saw and heard the still-mysterious black leather objects
encounter_events.ai_justification: Mysterious black leather objects seen and heard near the car have no clear semantic equivalent in the motif dictionary.

encounter_events.source_citation: the approach of the white creatures
encounter_events.ai_justification: White creatures approach Steven, described as humanoid beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: the approach of the white creatures
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as 'white creatures,' indicating white or ashen skin coloring.

encounter_events.source_citation: There are other things standing around me . . . there's nothing to be afraid of.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings communicate a repeated calming message requesting the witness not to be afraid.

encounter_events.source_citation: the repeated, calming message: 'There are other things standing around me . . . there's nothing to be afraid of.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The repeated calming message implies a pacification effect on the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: the episode of the figure digging while he was somehow held motionless
encounter_events.ai_justification: A figure is observed digging, which corresponds to beings gathering samples from the environment.

encounter_events.source_citation: while he was somehow held motionless
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven was held motionless while the figure dug, indicating paralysis or numbness imposed on the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: the placing of the clamp on his shoulders
encounter_events.ai_justification: A clamp placed on the witness's shoulders is a physical restraint device with no precise match in the motif dictionary. While E325 (control by devices) is close, this is specifically a physical clamp/restraint rather than a control mechanism.

encounter_events.source_citation: Steven had nothing more to go on than a vague feeling that something he could not remember happened to him one night on a particular stretch of highway.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator paraphrases that Steven experienced a period of missing time on a highway with no conscious memory of what occurred, which is the classic time lapse motif E200.

encounter_events.source_citation: Steven had nothing more to go on than a vague feeling that something he could not remember happened to him one night on a particular stretch of highway.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven retained a fragmentary, vague feeling that something had happened to him, even though he could not consciously recall the event. This matches A116.1: fragmentary memories of an experience persist.

encounter_events.source_citation: I didn't want to go any further. I'm afraid the worst is still to come.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven expresses anxiety and a sense of dread about what he cannot yet remember, feeling pursued by something unknown. This maps to A110: witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why.

encounter_events.source_citation: Steven could not understand how his car, traveling downhill at about seventy miles per hour, could make a violent right turn without rolling over, moving as if 'sucked by a giant magnet.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven's car appears to be under external control, making a violent turn at high speed without driver input, consistent with E410 (UFO or beings take control of vehicle).

encounter_events.source_citation: By the fall of 1979, Steven had consciously recalled a few later events from his experience, including the sense that he had been examined by his captors inside the UFO.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven consciously recalled fragments of his experience before hypnosis, including the sense of being examined. This is a spontaneous return of memory (A116).

encounter_events.source_citation: When I first see it, it scares me. All by myself. That's why I'm hesitating.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven expresses fear at the initial sight of the scene, consistent with E505 (fear response).

encounter_events.source_citation: His memories began as he stood beside his car, facing his white-skinned captors.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as white-skinned, matching B290 (skin white, gray, ashen or claylike).

encounter_events.source_citation: I see the . .. uh . .. I don't know what it is . . . a long clamp kind of thing. And there's a joint in the middle like an elbow, almost like an arm, and it's . . . around my shoulder. And I see it just, just holding me, over my right shoulder. It's connected to this . .. I don't know what this is.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A mechanical clamp-like instrument with a joint is holding Steven's shoulder, connected to other machinery. This matches X221 (probes or electrodes connected to other machinery).

encounter_events.source_citation: It looks like a saucer . . . that's what it looks like. It's whitish. / Like an egg sitting on it
encounter_events.ai_justification: The craft is described as saucer-like and egg-shaped, matching U102 (oval or egg shape).

encounter_events.source_citation: And it's sitting on something . . . looks like it's white also, a kind of platform. It looks like an erector set or something . . . some kind of girders, criss-cross . , . latticework . .. it sits on.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The lattice-work, girder-like platform supporting the craft has an unfinished, structural appearance matching U323 (rafters or unfinished look).

encounter_events.source_citation: a kind of platform. It looks like an erector set or something . . . some kind of girders, criss-cross . , . latticework . .. it sits on.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The lattice-work platform the craft sits on functions as landing gear or support structure, matching U134 (landing gear).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's holding me . .. if it grabs me, I feel . .. it hurts my back, my lower back on the right side.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The mechanical clamp is restraining Steven and causing pain, consistent with X156 (witness lies immobilized or restrained).

encounter_events.source_citation: They're watching me now. They're standing there watching
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings stand and watch Steven passively while he is restrained and in pain, indicating cold, indifferent behavior matching B905.

encounter_events.source_citation: the one guy starts motioning
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates with the witness through gestures/motioning rather than verbal language.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't think I could move if I wanted to . . . that thing is really on my body.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes being unable to move, indicating paralysis or immobilization, with something on his body enforcing it.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's a ramp . . . a little ramp. He wants me to walk up before him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a ramp leading into the craft, matching the motif for ramps/stairs.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's like a very, very quiet hum.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness hears a quiet humming sound coming from the craft, matching the buzzing/humming motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think the whole thing is vibrating, but it doesn't look like it's moving.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The craft vibrates without visible movement, indicating pulsation.

encounter_events.source_citation: the thing pushes me in. You'd think they'd realize I was going. . . .
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being forces or compels the witness into the craft by pushing him, even though he was already complying.

encounter_events.source_citation: there's a passageway. . . . It's round, almost like a tube we're walking through.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a round, tube-like passageway inside the craft.

encounter_events.source_citation: The thing's not on my back anymore and I'm very relaxed. / I'm just very relaxed, very calm.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes feeling very relaxed and calm inside the craft, indicating a pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: They're not going to hurt me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses or is given the impression that the beings will not hurt him, matching the promise of safety motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: this thing didn't look that big from the outside. Didn't look like there was that much room in it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior of the craft seems too large relative to its external appearance.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think we went the wrong way. Now, he . . . I don't think he knows which way to go . . . what to do now
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being appears to take a wrong turn and seems uncertain about which direction to go, indicating fallibility.

encounter_events.source_citation: And the door closes behind us.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The door closes behind them as they enter the room, consistent with seamlessly closing doors.

encounter_events.source_citation: This room, it's all white. It's almost the color of the outside of the ship
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room is described as all white, matching the white interior motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm sitting on a table in the middle of this room.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness finds himself on a table in the room, consistent with lying/sitting on an examining table.

encounter_events.source_citation: They put . . . they put a thing on my back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings place an instrument or device on the witness's back, causing intense pain, consistent with probes or instruments connected to machinery.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's curved on the inside . . . the walls aren't . . . I don't think there are any angles in the room.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room is round, domed, and without sharp edges, matching the curved interior without angles.

encounter_events.source_citation: Everything looks kind of whitish. Even when I look at my own hands . . . they look kind of whitish. It doesn't glow.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The lighting is bright and uniform without a specific source, casting a whitish tone on everything including the witness's own hands.

encounter_events.source_citation: The walls around the room are curved, so the inside of the room would be the shape of a saucer. Even the ceiling is curved. It's like a big oval. Yeah, the room is a big, circular, flattened-out oval.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes the room as a big circular flattened-out oval with curved walls and ceiling, matching U210 (round, oval room).

encounter_events.source_citation: I almost want to say that the air in the room is white also. Something strange about the color of everything. I don't know how to describe it . . . everything is kind of milky or misty or something.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The milky, misty white quality of the room's atmosphere matches U231 (bright and misty interior lighting).

encounter_events.source_citation: they almost blend in with the white.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The dominant white color of the room interior matches U220 (white interior).

encounter_events.source_citation: It doesn't shine, but everything has almost that metallic kind of glow to it
encounter_events.ai_justification: The metallic glow of the interior surfaces matches U240 (metallic interior).

encounter_events.source_citation: This table is so . . . I don't know, it's like it grows out of the floor. It's perfectly smooth. The same color. There are no drawers or anything. No cabinets, no handles. Nothing. It's just like a pillar.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The perfectly smooth, seamless surfaces with no visible joints or hardware match U145 (smooth).

encounter_events.source_citation: And there is not a sound. Nothing. I think it's the quietest place I was ever in.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Complete silence inside the craft matches U259 (silence).

encounter_events.source_citation: This table is so . . . I don't know, it's like it grows out of the floor. It's perfectly smooth.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is seated on a table/pillar that serves as an examination surface, matching U300 (examination table or bed).

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a thing over my head . . . it's coming out of the ceiling. It looks like it should be made of metal or something, but I can't tell if it is. It looks kind of like something I saw in a planetarium. A big thing. It has a kind of bulbous head on one end. It looks like a big insect. It's about twice the size of me. It's nine feet long or so, and maybe three or four feet across. It's really intricate.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A large eyelike/bulbous device descends from the ceiling, matching U305 (an eyelike device lowers from the ceiling).

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't know where my clothes went. / It looks like a wrapped diaper of some sort . . . very soft. It's wrapped in a criss-cross.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness's clothes have been removed and replaced with a minimal wrap, matching X100 (witness undressed) and the replacement garment aspect.

encounter_events.source_citation: It looks like a wrapped diaper of some sort . . . very soft. It's wrapped in a criss-cross.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness's clothing has been replaced with a different garment (a soft wrap), matching X105 (clothing replaced with robe, smock or other garment).

encounter_events.source_citation: (There is an obvious gap in his recall at this point, between his entering the room and finding himself nearly naked, seated on the table.)
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of the transition between entering the room and finding himself undressed and seated, matching E201 (doorway amnesia: blackout on entering or leaving craft).

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm just sitting there
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is seated on the table/pillar during the procedure, matching X150 (witness sits on a stool or chair).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are two guys who seem to be running the show. One is . . . the guy who came in with me
encounter_events.ai_justification: Two beings appear to direct the proceedings, with one being the escort, matching B800 (one being acts as leader, spokesman).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are two guys who seem to be running the show. / the guy who brought me in is just sort of watching everything. He seems to know what's going on.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Two beings direct the examination while others stand by, matching B802 (one being or two acts as examiner, doctor, or director).

encounter_events.source_citation: there are a few others over there against the walls, circled around.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Additional beings stand around the walls observing, forming a group present during the examination, matching X202 (a group of beings without obvious division of labor).

encounter_events.source_citation: And it's, like, on a pivotal point in the center of it, so it's suspended in the center. And it turns down by itself; they don't touch it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The device moves autonomously without being touched by the beings, matching E416 (a machine acts as if on its own, without human control).

encounter_events.source_citation: It turns so the needle part is pointing down towards me, and that's what runs along the bottom of my back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The ceiling-mounted device descends and scans/probes along the witness's back, matching X225 (eyelike device descends from ceiling and scans witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And when they put it against my back—I don't know whether they're sticking something into my back, but it hurts. That's what hurt before. / It's a flat kind of thing on the end, yeah, that's digging into my back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A probe/needle-like instrument connected to the larger ceiling device is applied to the witness's back causing pain, matching X221 (beings use probes or electrodes connected to other machinery).

encounter_events.source_citation: It has a really calming effect, being in this room. It's almost like being hypnotized. This is really . . . you almost feel as if you could float. It's very peaceful.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences a calming, peaceful, almost hypnotic effect while in the room, matching E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: you almost feel as if you could float.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness feels light as if he could float, matching E121 (pseudo-floating effect: witness only feels light).

encounter_events.source_citation: All this time I've been sitting with my legs over the edge of this . . . I guess it's the doctor's table.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes sitting on an examining table, matching X155 (witness lies/sits on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: on my back. Just touching my back. I don't know what it's doing there. It doesn't hurt now . . . it's not a needle. Feels like it would be almost as wide as my hand if my hand were flattened out.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A wide, flat instrument is pressed against the witness's back, consistent with X227 (a platelike 'X-ray' device examines the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And, uh . . . they take it off and it hurts when it comes off. And the thing goes back up into the ceiling. It's still up there, it doesn't go out of sight or anything. I can look straight up . . . directly over my head.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The device retracts upward into the ceiling after scanning, matching X225 (eyelike device descends from ceiling and scans witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess it's the doctor's table. It's one doctor's office I didn't have to wait to get into, I guess.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness identifies the furniture as a doctor's table, confirming U300 (room has examination table or bed).

encounter_events.source_citation: In fact, I feel a little bit dizzy. My back hurts a little bit.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences dizziness during the examination, consistent with E106 (perceptual distortions and illusions).

encounter_events.source_citation: They're taking the thing I'm wearing off. / And he's (lifting?) it up with his hand. I didn't know they did anything with their hands. And it slides against my leg
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings remove the witness's garment, matching X100 (witness undressed by beings).

encounter_events.source_citation: These two are talking to each other . . . I mean, or they're communicating with each other, 'cause there's something going on between the two of them. They're looking at each other
encounter_events.ai_justification: Two beings communicate with each other non-verbally, matching C205 (telepathy between beings).

encounter_events.source_citation: Why are they waiting until it starts hurting to (inaudible). / I don't think they really care whether it hurts or not.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings show no understanding of or concern for the witness's pain, matching B756 (no understanding of pain).

encounter_events.source_citation: it's a version of the old hit your knee and see if it jumps up in the air . . . 'cause that's what my right leg did. (Chuckles.) They're testing my reflexes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings test the witness's reflexes by striking his back and observing his leg twitch, directly matching X244 (beings test the witness's reflexes).

encounter_events.source_citation: No, I'm really not that thrilled with being there now. I don't think they really care whether it hurts or not.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness perceives the beings as indifferent to his suffering, matching B905 (beings behave in a cold, indifferent, insensitive manner).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think the guy who brought me in, the leader, I think he's getting impatient.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The leader being shows impatience, matching B913 (beings are impatient or have little time).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think the guy who brought me in, the leader
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness identifies one being as the leader, matching B800 (one being acts as leader, spokesman).

encounter_events.source_citation: He's kind of . . . he turns to look at where we came in. That's why I think a door must have closed or something, 'cause I don't see a door there or anything. It's just all smooth.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The entrance has closed seamlessly so that no door is visible, matching U132 (doors close seamlessly).

encounter_events.source_citation: The other guy who was in the room when I walked in. / There are a few other characters in this room also, there are like one, two, three, four, five
encounter_events.ai_justification: Multiple beings are present in the examination room assisting or observing, matching X201 (an assistant helps the examiner).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's one doctor's office I didn't have to wait to get into, I guess. / They're awfully interested in my back.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room functions as an examination room where medical-like procedures are performed, matching U202 (examination room).

encounter_events.source_citation: That thing has come down and it's pushing against my back again.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The device descends from the ceiling a second time to press against the witness's back, matching U305 (an eyelike device lowers from the ceiling).

encounter_events.source_citation: about five or six of them, 'cause they're kind of scattered around against the walls with their hands behind their backs. They look like guards or something.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Five or six beings standing around the walls with hands behind their backs described as looking like guards matches B620 (stand guard, direct traffic).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's kind of a light now, out of the ceiling, out of the center. It's coming actually out of the center where this big device is hooked up. And it shines on me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A light from the ceiling shining down on the witness matches U235 (bright source located above the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And it shines on me. Kinda warm. Feels good.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Light shining on the witness during examination matches X224 (light or light beam shines on witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was getting a little bit cold in there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness notes the room was cold before the light warmed him, matching U250 (cold).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was getting a little bit cold in there. It feels good now.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room changes from cold to warm when the light shines on the witness, matching U257 (room changes from cold to warm).

encounter_events.source_citation: They want me to turn over . . . on my stomach.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings direct the witness to turn over against his preference, matching B903 (beings force or compel witness against his will).

encounter_events.source_citation: They want me to turn over . . . on my stomach. / this table sits up really high
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is lying on an examining table, now turned onto his stomach, matching X155 (witness lies on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: I feel something touching that spot where it itched. / I think it's the mark on my back that they want to look at. To see what it is, I think. I think I have something on my back, some kind of a mole or something. Yeah, they're touching it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings touch and examine a specific spot on the witness's back, matching X210 (beings touch witness in various places, as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's like on a joint or something . . . his head is very . . . and I do see his neck. I didn't know he had a neck (chuckles), but he does. It's a little skinny thing. But he turns and it's just like . . . I think his neck can bend . . . it's strange.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's neck bends in an unusual joint-like manner, matching B275 (abnormally jointed).

encounter_events.source_citation: I didn't know he had a neck (chuckles), but he does. It's a little skinny thing.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness initially thought the being had no neck, and the neck is described as a 'little skinny thing,' matching B238 (being has no neck, head set directly on shoulders) — the near-absence of a visible neck.

encounter_events.source_citation: he kind of pushes on it and it hurts a little. / he's really getting close to my back. / Now he's just pushing on it, pushing down on it. I think he just wants to feel it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: One specific being acts as the examiner, leaning close and probing the witness's back while others stand by, matching B802 (one being acts as examiner or doctor).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's very hard. Like, uh, just the way it looks. It looks like hard plastic and it feels hard. I don't know how he could possibly feel anything with a hard finger like that.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's finger is described as feeling like hard plastic with no temperature difference. This tactile quality of the being's digits does not match any existing motif code precisely.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's strange, but what I can't figure out is he's so short and this table sits up really high.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness notes the being is notably short relative to the high table, matching B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less) or at minimum B221. The emphasis on 'so short' suggests B220.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think it's the mark on my back that they want to look at. To see what it is, I think. / I don't know what the great fascination is.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings show intense interest in a physical mark on the witness's body, examining it closely and pressing on it, matching B711 (interest in chemical composition, internal makeup).

encounter_events.source_citation: Unless he's floating. (Chuckles.) Maybe he is.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness observes a being who appears to be floating, unable to see its feet or what it stands on, implying apparent weightlessness/floating of the being. However, this describes the being's movement, mapping to B500.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm trying to look down at his feet but I can't see them. He must be standing on something, is the only thing I can think. (Chuckles.) Unless he's floating. (Chuckles.) Maybe he is.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness observes a being that appears to be floating, as he cannot see its feet or any surface it stands on. This maps to beings gliding or floating.

encounter_events.source_citation: Maybe he can't stand the sight of blood.

encounter_events.source_citation: I get the feeling that they're looking inside of it.

encounter_events.source_citation: My leg, my right leg especially, going down my right leg, it feels a little bit numb. Also like it's falling asleep.

encounter_events.source_citation: they turn me on my left side now and I'm lying on my left side.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is repositioned on the examining surface, lying on his left side, consistent with lying on an examining table or couch.

encounter_events.source_citation: I'm getting sleepy there. I don't know whether they're doing it or if I'm just getting sleepy. Yeah, I'm really comfortable.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness becomes sleepy and comfortable during the examination, suspecting the beings may be inducing this state. This maps to pacification effect.

encounter_events.source_citation: Something is poking my stomach. I mean, not poking into . . . on the outside it's poking.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An instrument is being used to probe the witness's stomach externally, mapping to beings using probes or electrodes connected to other machinery.

encounter_events.source_citation: A rod now, it's just poking into my . . . I can see the color of this. This is dark, this is like a dark gray. encounter_events.ai_justification: A dark gray rod/wand descends from a device and taps/probes the witness's stomach, mapping to beings using probes connected to other machinery.

encounter_events.source_citation: It . . . almost looks as if it's made of lead. It's almost that color. I don't see any lines or anything. It's perfectly shaped. Cylindrical . . . kind of very skinny, though. And it's flat on the end. Not hollow.

encounter_events.source_citation: I see the back of his head, now. . . . It's almost perfectly round.

encounter_events.source_citation: The supervisor in this room is the other guy, though. It's like he's the boss and he just took over once we got into this room.
encounter_events.ai_justification: One being acts as leader/boss in the examination room, matching B800 (one being acts as leader).

encounter_events.source_citation: That thing is gone, now. The thing moved up into the ceiling and the light isn't on me anymore.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An eyelike device that had descended from the ceiling and scanned the witness now retracts, matching X225 (eyelike device descends from ceiling and scans witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And I'm lying on my back now. I do that myself, though.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness lies on his back on the examining surface, matching X155 (witness lies on examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: I knew they wanted me on my back and maybe they just let me do it . . . instead of forcing me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Witness obeys the beings' wishes as if he knows what they want, matching E214 (witness obeys beings as if they know best).

encounter_events.ai_justification: One being acts as examiner/doctor, matching B802 (one being acts as examiner or doctor).

encounter_events.ai_justification: The being touches the witness in various places (stomach, inner leg) as if examining, matching X210 (beings touch witness in various places as if examining).

encounter_events.source_citation: Still don't understand how he can be looking down . . . he's so short.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The doctor being is described as very short, matching B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less).

encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings flex and contort the witness's limbs using the metal device, matching X215 (beings flex or contort limbs of the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And they want to feel what's on my skin. / he's certainly interested in it.

encounter_events.source_citation: the big, whitish room

encounter_events.source_citation: The thin, round metal loops which raised and slightly spread his legs must have come up from the surface of the table.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Metal loops used as instruments/clamps to position the witness, matching X220 (beings use handheld instruments, clamps).

encounter_events.ai_justification: After returning home in 1973, Steven felt unclean and wanted to bathe, matching A113 (witness feels unclean and in need of a bath). This is a conscious post-encounter memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: he was so tired that he gave up on the idea and just went to bed
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven was extremely tired after the encounter, matching A102 (motility problems: tiredness). This is a conscious post-encounter memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: He definitely had the sense that he had withheld some details of his ordeal from Dr. Clamar and myself, though he wasn't sure what they might be. 'I really don't like to think about it,' he said. 'I'm trying to put the whole thing out of my mind.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven feels compelled to suppress and conceal details of his experience, matching A114 (witness feels obliged to keep experience a secret). This is a conscious aftereffect.

encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven experiences anxiety and shame about the encounter without fully understanding why, matching A110 (witness feels pursued or anxious without knowing why). This emotional reaction emerged after hypnosis as a conscious aftereffect.

encounter_events.source_citation: this tubular implement with a rounded end was placed against his chest
encounter_events.ai_justification: A handheld cylindrical instrument is used on the witness's body, matching X220 (beings use handheld instruments, clamps).

encounter_events.source_citation: For a short time, he recalls, this tubular implement with a rounded end was placed against his chest.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A small instrument is placed on the chest of the witness, directly matching X226 (a small instrument lies on the chest of the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: seemed to be regarded by the others as highly significant, 'As if it were the most important part of the entire operation.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings treat the procedure with clinical detachment, focused on the instrument's significance rather than the witness's experience, indicating cold, indifferent behavior (B905).

encounter_events.source_citation: He said when they pressed here, and he indicated his femoral nerve, his thigh moved. / He asked me what I thought they were doing when they went up and down his back with their machine, stimulating various nerves.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Beings used probes or instruments connected to machinery to stimulate nerves along Steven's body and spine, producing motor reactions. This matches X221: beings use probes or electrodes connected to other machinery.

encounter_events.ai_justification: The systematic stimulation of nerves and observation of motor reactions (femoral nerve causing thigh movement) constitutes testing the witness's reflexes, matching X244.

encounter_events.source_citation: I told him that it seemed to me they just wanted to find out how he worked.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Dr. Cooper's assessment that the beings were systematically stimulating nerves to understand how Steven's body worked indicates a specific interest in the nervous system, matching B716.

encounter_events.source_citation: Steve said it had only felt as if he had been opened up—he had never seen any blood or noticeable scar
encounter_events.ai_justification: Steven felt as though he had been opened up, implying an incision or surgical-like procedure for unknown purpose, matching X222: beings make incision for unknown purpose.
